title: YINMIK pH Meter for Food, Digital Food pH Tester, Accurate Canning pH Test Kits with ATC, Professional Fermenting pH Test Pen, Spear pH Probe for Bread Cheese Sushi Rice Sourdough Sauce Meat
features: [Professional pH Tester for Food]：YINMIK YK-2S is a professional food pH meter designed to measure the acidity and alkalinity of various foods in the kitchen. pH test range: 0.00-14.00pH; resolution is 0.01pH. While measuring the pH of food, the temperature of the food can also be obtained. The digital food tester is also equipped with a sponge protective cover with electrode protection liquid inside, which can extend the service life.

Monitor Sourdough Starter Acidity: Check the pH of sourdough bread dough during the fermentation step, some breads which require pH levels be at a particular level during fermentation. The spear probe design can easily obtain pH measurements, just stick the spear into the dough and will get an instant and stable reading. With LCD display screen, very easy to read.

Nice pH Meter for Cosmetics: With Spear Probe the pH meter works great for checking the pH of the cosmetics and lotions. There is no need making slurries before the pH testing, just stick the spear tip into your sample, waiting for the reading to be stable, then you got the accurate measurement

Digital pH Tester for Liquid: Measure liquids such as hydroponic solutions, drinking water, beverages, etc. Help Monitoring kombuchas pH level. Ideal pH level for kombucha is 2.5-3.5, ensure that the starting pH of kombucha first fermentation is 4.5 or below. This pH tester is a perfect tool for any home brewer, whether it's o make kombucha, beer, vinegar, water kefir, etc.

[YINMIK Service for You] The YINMIK pH tester adopts 3-point calibration (4.00 7.00 10.01), which can obtain the pH value more accurately. The pH meter carries 6 packs of pH powder packs, convenient calibration. In addition, we provide 365-days warranty and 90-days free return, and 24-hours respond for any question about the product.
